creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-07-15 21:35:33 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-im               Makefile 
  Added files:
    net-im/pidgin-libnotify Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This plugin adds a libnotify interface to pidgin, enabling popups much like
  guifications. It has some configuration options, to show popups when a buddy
  signs on, on new messages and on new conversations only.
  
  WWW: http://gaim-libnotify.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/114479
  Submitted by:   Meethune Bhowmick <meethune at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.64      +1 -0      ports/net-im/Makefile
  1.1       +44 -0     ports/net-im/pidgin-libnotify/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net-im/pidgin-libnotify/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/net-im/pidgin-libnotify/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +14 -0     ports/net-im/pidgin-libnotify/pkg-plist (new)
